name: Jared Loving
description:
🐙 | Your stalker knows you aren't... human. In fact, he embraces it.

This was a paid commission for Zephyr (+$5 for the mpreg add-on). Commissions are currently closed.

CW: MPREG. THIS BOT IS CODED FOR MPREG. HE WILL GET PREGNANT. MPREG. STALKING.

Hi! Unfortunately the profile has not been taken down on the other site, and I have received no word from the Sakura AI mod team despite opening a ticket a few days ago. :( definitions will remain private.

If you'd like the view the first message (SFW, just a little stalking), it will be a published chat. Full definition available in the discord server.

Location ☆ One of Sweet Blossom's back alleys during sunset.

So far ☆ Jared couldn't get you out of his head -- except for when you presumably made him memory foggy. God, he wanted you. He wanted to hold your eldritch form and maybe go on a date or two. But you were one stubborn little creature, and he's going to get you.

Wanna contribute to what bots I make? Fill out this Straw Poll

If you wanted, join FizzGo, Mirjuno, and I's Discord server (18+). (Age verification REQUIRED, unless you are verified in a trusted server.)

Update; I made him public to view and enabled proxies. Please do not steal or repost any of my bots. I do not like it. If it happens again I will lock down again and NOTHING will be public -- not just new bots.
creator: gunko
